title: rosa × dumetorum var. obscura
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. obscura, also known as the wild rose or obscure wild rose, is a rare and lesser-known variety of rose plant that is native to parts of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. obscura include its potential to aid in digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Rosa × dumetorum var. obscura can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and skin health.
